# AGENTS.md

## Project Shape
- Unity project pinned to `6000.3.2f1` in `ProjectSettings/ProjectVersion.txt`; package versions live in `Packages/manifest.json` and `Packages/packages-lock.json`.
- Runtime code is under `Assets/DebugPanel/` in the `DebugPanel` asmdef; editor-only prefab tooling is under `Assets/DebugPanel/Editor/` in `DebugPanel.Editor`.
- The build settings include only `Assets/Scenes/SampleScene.unity`.

## Do Not Edit Generated Files
- Root `*.csproj` files are Unity-generated and say they will be overwritten; change asmdefs or Unity assets/scripts instead.
- Do not commit Unity local/generated directories: `Library/`, `Temp/`, `Logs/`, `UserSettings/`, `Build/`, `Builds/`, `.vs/`.

## Debug Panel Runtime
- `DebugPanelBootstrapper` uses `[RuntimeInitializeOnLoadMethod(AfterSceneLoad)]` to create/register `DebugOptions.Current`; define `DISABLE_DEBUGPANEL` to compile it out.
- `DebugPanelManager.Instance` loads `Resources/DebugPanel.prefab`; if it is missing, runtime falls back to a code-only object.
- The shipped prefab and row prefabs are in `Assets/DebugPanel/Resources/` and are generated by the Unity menu item `Tools/Debug Panel/Build Prefab` from `DebugPanelPrefabBuilder`.

## Adding Options
- Extend `DebugOptions` with partial files such as `DebugOptions.MyFeature.cs`; `DebugOptions.Current` is the singleton registered at startup.
- Option discovery is reflection-based: public instance properties of `bool`, numeric types, `string`, or enums, plus public `void` no-arg methods.
- Use `Category`, `DisplayName`, `Sort`, and `NumberRange` attributes to control UI grouping, labels, ordering, and numeric slider bounds.

## Verification
- Prefer Unity/MCP verification when available: refresh assets/scripts, then read the Unity console for compile errors.
- Tests use `com.unity.test-framework`, but no test assemblies/files are present yet; if tests are added, run focused EditMode/PlayMode tests by name via the Unity test runner.
